global.description: The ad features a combination of text and abstract graphic elements centered around the theme of security and simplicity.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'NovaPay' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Graphic elements
elements.description: A collection of abstract shapes and outlines in the center of the ad, creating a visually engaging layout.

elements.label: Overlay shapes
elements.description: Additional abstract shapes layered over the main graphic elements, enhancing the visual complexity.

elements.label: Background shapes
elements.description: A larger rectangular shape in the center, serving as a background for the text elements.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small circular graphic element positioned towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: Another small circular graphic element, slightly to the left of the previous one.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small circular graphic element positioned to the right of the previous two.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small circular graphic element located towards the bottom right corner of the ad.

elements.label: Main message
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Secure & simple' with a subtitle 'Built for peace of mind' in a clear, readable font.
elements.text_content: Secure simple Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Watch now' in a contrasting color, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: NovaPay logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'NovaPay' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in a simple font, positioned near the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, minimalist with abstract shapes, secure and simple service.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by abstract shapes in the center, with the main message and CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NovaPay, UGC, Secure & simple, Built for peace of mind, Watch now
